pi_items.source: task.json description and setup_task.sh line 49 API call
task.json description line 3, synthetic example URL with example.com domain
task.json description requires 'Welcome to the TechSummit 2024 Attendee Feedback Survey'
task.json description requires message containing 'This survey takes approximately 5 minutes to complete'
task.json description requires 'Thank you for sharing your valuable feedback about TechSummit 2024'
task.json description requires 'Thank you for sharing your valuable feedback about TechSummit 2024'
LimeSurvey API documentation (api.limesurvey.org) confirms 'G' = 'Group by Group' format; task.json description line 5 specifies this requirement
task.json description line 6 requires enabling 'Show progress bar'; LimeSurvey uses Y/N for boolean fields in database
task.json description line 7 requires enabling 'Print answers'; LimeSurvey uses Y/N for boolean fields
task.json description line 8 requires enabling 'Allow backward navigation' (Show 'Previous' button); LimeSurvey uses Y/N for boolean fields
task.json description line 4 requires enabling 'Automatically load URL' for redirect; LimeSurvey uses Y/N for boolean fields

privileged_info_summary: The task configures a synthetic LimeSurvey survey titled 'TechSummit 2024 Attendee Feedback' with specific presentation settings. The survey is created programmatically via LimeSurvey API and is not based on real data. Verified settings include: format set to 'G' (Group by Group), progress bar enabled, print answers enabled, backward navigation enabled, and auto-redirect to https://techsummit2024.example.com/thank-you enabled. The welcome message must contain 'TechSummit 2024' and '5 minutes', while the end message must contain 'valuable feedback' and 'TechSummit 2024'. All metadata claims match the corresponding task description requirements.
